subcodes.first_line: God beareth witness unto that which We have testified in the Crimson Tablet through Our Most Exalted Pen. Were We to make mention thereof, all would be struck with bewilderment [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله بما شهدنا فی الصحیفه الحمرآء من قلمی الاعلی انا لو نذکره لینصعق من
